word: H6582 - פָּשַׁח - pâshach - paw-shakh' - Pull in pieces

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּשׁח

Transliteration: pâshach

Phonetic: paw-shakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to tear, rip, tear in pieces
    1. (Piel) to tear in pieces

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1844

Part(s) of speech: Verb
